prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is M-201 Shaft alignment within 2.7 Equipment & Machinery. The relevant subcategory is 2.7.2 Alignment. The observed field condition is: soft foot uncorrected (dial reading in photo - ME). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors API 686, laser system manuals. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T5 M-201 Measurement & estimation
